ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR( AND(INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Primary Hours Approver"), OR( INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Secondary Hours Approver"), INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Escalation Hours Approver"), INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Viewer"), INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Viewer") ) ),
AND(INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Secondary Hours Approver"), OR( INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Primary Hours Approver"), INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Escalation Hours Approver"), INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Viewer"), INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Consultant") ) ),
AND(INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Escalation Hours Approver"), OR( INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Secondary Hours Approver"), INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Primary Hours Approver"), INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Viewer"), INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Consultant") ) ),
AND(INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Viewer"), OR( INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Secondary Hours Approver"), INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Escalation Hours Approver"), INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Primary Hours Approver"), INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Consultant") ) ),
AND(INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Consultant"), OR( INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Secondary Hours Approver"), INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Escalation Hours Approver"), INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Primary Hours Approver"), INCLUDES(IP_PortalType__c, "Viewer") ) )
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can not select Primary Hours Approver OR Secondary Hours Approver OR Escalation Hours Approver OR Viewer OR Consultant together
